---
title: "Scholarships & awards"
transition_status: "updated"
transition_comment: "update"
---

Frankfurt School offers several scholarship options for students across different programmes.
The official overview is available on the [Frankfurt School Student Financing page](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing).

* **Bachelor scholarships**
  Tuition-fee reductions for Bachelor students, including the Diversity Scholarship Programme, General FS Scholarship, Premium Scholarship, and selected Bachelor of Arts scholarships.
  [Bachelor scholarships – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **Bachelor of Science diversity scholarships**
  Scholarships for applicants with strong academic profiles and specific strengths, such as Women in Business, Entrepreneurship, Quantitative Excellence, Speech and Debate, Social Engagement, International Excellence, and Sports.
  [BSc scholarships – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **Pre-experience Master’s scholarships**
  Partial tuition-fee scholarships for top applicants to selected full-time Master programmes, including the [Master of Finance](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/master/master-of-finance), [Master in Management](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/master/master-in-management), [Master of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/master/master-of-artificial-intelligence-and-data-science), [Master in Financial Technology](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/master/master-in-financial-technology), and [Master in Real Estate](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/master/master-in-real-estate).
  [Master scholarships – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **Programme-specific Master scholarships**
  Scholarships linked to specific fields or sponsors, such as corporate governance, sustainable finance, real estate, risk management, M&A, technology, data, and women in business.
  [Programme-specific scholarships – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **Professional Master scholarships**
  Partial tuition-fee scholarships for selected Professional Master programmes, including Corporate Performance & Restructuring, Banking & Capital Markets Law, and Mergers & Acquisitions.
  [Professional Master scholarships – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **MBA scholarships**
  Partial scholarships for MBA applicants, including diversity, women in business, entrepreneurship and leadership, sector-specific, and high-performing candidate scholarships.
  [Full-time MBA scholarships](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/mba-emba/full-time-mba) · [Part-time MBA scholarships](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/mba-emba/part-time-mba) · [Executive MBA scholarships](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/mba-emba/executive-mba)

* **Doctoral scholarships and awards**
  Funding opportunities for doctoral students, including the Frankfurt School Foundation Doctoral Scholarship and selected research-related awards.
  [Doctoral Programme funding – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/study/doctoral)

* **Klaus-Peter Müller Scholarship**
  Scholarship for selected Master students with strong academic performance, financial need, and a commitment to contributing to the Frankfurt School community.
  [Klaus-Peter Müller Scholarship – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **Deutschlandstipendium**
  Public-private scholarship programme providing a monthly non-repayable grant to eligible students enrolled at Frankfurt School.
  [Deutschlandstipendium – Frankfurt School](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/students-alumni/financing)

* **State-funded scholarship organisations**
  Frankfurt School encourages eligible students to apply for scholarships from German state-funded scholarship organisations.
  [StipendiumPlus](https://www.stipendiumplus.de/)


<!--
Bamberg:
    - [Eliteakademie](https://www.eliteakademie.de/){target=_blank}
    - [Stipendienberatung](https://www.uni-bamberg.de/stipendium/){target=_blank}
    - [Step by Step: Stipendienprogramm Chancengleichheit/Gleichstellung](https://www.uni-bamberg.de/gbwiss/foerderung/step-by-step/){target=_blank}
-->

## Awards

- [Bachelor Award/WI](https://wirtschaftsinformatik.de/studium/bachelor-award){target=_blank}
